description: Renders a 3D surface as a wireframe mesh from an explicit equation z = f(x, y) over a rectangular domain.
utility: Plot a 3D surface z = f(x, y) on a g3d graph

arguments.name: graph
arguments.description: The 3D graph container created with g3d()

arguments.name: equation
arguments.description: Surface equation as a quoted string "x^2 + y^2" or a function definition reference

arguments.name: xRange
arguments.description: Domain for x variable. Defaults to g3d axis range if omitted

arguments.name: yRange
arguments.description: Domain for y variable. Defaults to g3d axis range if omitted

arguments.name: fillOpacity
arguments.description: Surface fill opacity from 0 to 1 - e.g., fo(0.8)

alternates.description: Surface using g3d default axis ranges
Surface with explicit x and y domain
Surface using a function definition reference for reuse

alternates.syntax: plot3d(G, "x^2 - y^2", range(-2, 2), range(-2, 2), c(gold), fo(0.8), fc(yellow))
alternates.description: Colored surface with fill opacity and fill color

examples.scenario: Wave surface with restricted pi ranges
examples.expression:
G=g3d(at(4,23), view(16.1, 14.5))
plot_3=plot3d(G, "sin(x)*cos(y)", range(-pi, pi), range(-pi, pi))

examples.scenario: Surface with animated tangent plane and variable animator
examples.expression:
G=g3d(at(1,9), view(21.1, 22.2))
f(x, y) = x^2 + y^2
P = plot3d(G, f, range(-3, 3), range(-3, 3))
varanim_1=variableanimator(at(6,37),"x0",1,-2,"text(Tangent At)")
y0 = 1
pt = point3d(G, x0, y0, f(x0, y0))
T = tangentplane(G, P, x0, y0)
